title: The ultimate UK food guide: 10 most exciting new London restaurant openings of 2026
summary_full: London's dining scene is experiencing exciting new openings this summer.  Elegant seafood spots and smoky barbecue joints are among the new arrivals.  Stylish neighbourhood bistros and French brasseries also feature prominently.  These diverse culinary destinations highlight the city's evolving food landscape.  Visitors can explore these exciting new restaurants across various London neighbourhoods.
